You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

Cool whites and medical blues, frosted-glass and soft acrylic materials, Z-axis layering, gentle light beams for flow. <Prompt5>Focal point: an immaculate, fully stocked clinic shelf—bulk cartons of nitrile dental gloves, neatly stacked sterilization pouches, and organized mask packs—gleaming under clean daylight. Open generic shipping boxes with paper padding at floor edge, tidy and unobtrusive. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh; natural mixed clinic lighting; clinical blues/whites palette. No extra text, no logos, no watermark.</Prompt5>

<Prompt1>Poster-like digital composition centered on a large frosted-glass rounded “Download” button with a subtle click ripple; behind it, a translucent circular green–yellow shield emblem (no lettering) implies protection. A thin installer prompt card with a clean progress bar (about 80%) hovers in soft depth. Along the bottom edge, tiny privacy/compliance badge icons with masked numbers appear, not readable. Light streams converge into the button, signaling speed and efficiency. Void background, soft volumetric glow, realistic refractions, precise shadows, balanced contrast. 50mm prime lens, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, crisp subject, uncluttered. No humans, no physical devices, no readable text, no brand names, no watermark, no extra UI clutter. Emphasize reliability and affordability through restrained, high-fidelity materials.</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>Symmetric, editorial layout: a floating installer card made of matte-frosted glass with a bold circular progress ring and three clean check icons; eight small golden tokens orbit subtly to suggest VIP benefits. A small shield emblem sits in a corner (no lettering). Bottom row shows faint privacy/regulatory badge icons with blurred numbers, not readable. Cool white and soft green palette communicates security-focused practicality and efficiency. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth, realistic refraction, soft shadows, microtexture, clean composition. No humans, no devices, no readable UI text, no brand names, no watermark, no clutter. Value-first framing on the installer card; calm, premium yet affordable aesthetic.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>Natural home desk scene: laptop at a slight angle on a tidy wooden surface, screen showing a clean installer prompt with a large rounded button; subtle reflections of the room on the glass. A small shield emblem (no lettering) in the corner; a thin footer line with tiny privacy/compliance badge icons and masked numbers, not readable. Focus is locked on the installer UI; a mug, notebook, and plant sit softly blurred in the background. 35mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, correct perspective, realistic screen glow, gentle daylight. No people visible, no eye contact, no excessive props. No extra text, no brand names, no watermark. Reliable, efficient, practical mood.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Clean poster scene: a multi-layered glass shield at center; inside, orderly browser-tab slivers align in a neat row. A glowing green download arrow descends into a rounded button below; eight soft gold tokens settle along the base to imply VIP unlocks. At the footer, three tiny compliance badge icons with blurred numbers, not readable. Monochrome-to-soft-green gradient background, subtle rim light, precise reflections, calm composition. 50mm, f/2.8, shallow depth, crisp subject, cinematic bokeh. No devices, no humans, no readable text, no brand names, no watermark. Emphasize security, reliability, and speed through ordered geometry and light trails.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Extreme close framing on a frosted-glass rounded download button, a clean pointer icon hovering just above it; the button reflects a faint circular green–yellow shield emblem (no lettering). Behind, a slim installer card with a minimal progress bar and tiny privacy/compliance badges with masked numbers, not readable, softly defocused. Subtle star-like accents hint at VIP benefits unlocking. High-fidelity materials, realistic refraction, soft bloom, tidy hierarchy. 50mm prime lens, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, sharp focal plane, uncluttered background. No humans, no physical devices, no readable text, no brand names, no watermark. Convey efficiency, reliability, and affordability through neat alignment and confident lighting.</Prompt5>

Escape to the heart of the Catskills, where nature sets the pace and every moment is meant to be savored. Tucked away on the Chapin Estate in The Western Catskills, The Chatwal Lo

[Page Content]
Attention Learn more Escape to the heart of the Catskills, where nature sets the pace and every moment is meant to be savored. Tucked away on the Chapin Estate in The Western Catskills, The Chatwal Lodge, an all-inclusive resort in White Lake, New York, is a former 18,000-acre wildlife reserve steeped in a century of stories. Here, 14 boutique-inspired luxury accommodations invite you to embrace the pines and the beauty of the seasons. A little quiet goes a long way as you relax, recharge, and unwind at your own pace. After a day of exploration, gather for lighthearted games, savor farm-to-table dining, or sip craft cocktails fireside. The Chatwal Lodge now participates in the World of Hyatt loyalty program. Discover exclusive member benefits and rewards designed to make your stay even more memorable. Built for those seeking a quiet and luxurious escape, our lodge offers an atmosphere best suited to adult travelers.  For reservations please call +1 844-820-0258 Choose from 14 extraordinary boutique rooms, each uniquely designed to offer ample space and every luxury you desire. Thoughtfully crafted with hand-carved furnishings and refined rustic details, every room invites you to unwind, explore, and indulge amid the stunning Hudson Valley landscape at our all-inclusive luxury resort. Explore Rooms & Suites As part of The Unbound Collection by Hyatt brand, we invite you to explore storied spaces that create an ideal backdrop for your unforgettable tale. From historic gems to modern marvels, author your next chapter with The Unbound Collection by Hyatt. Explore All Dining (3) The Chatwal Lodge’s main restaurant showcases the best of the Catskills, sourcing from local farms, bakeries, and artisans to create a warm, inviting dining experience and world-class menus that celebrate the region’s bounty, highlighting the freshest seasonal ingredients with creativity and care. Whether you're hosting an intimate meeting, a private dinner, or an open-air cocktail reception, our all-inclusive lodge is perfect for corporate retreats and team-building, offering a seamless blend of luxury, nature, and personalized service. Explore Meeting Spaces in a Virtual Tour Celebrate your special moments surrounded by the whispering woods and breathtaking beauty of the Catskills. Whether you're planning an intimate wedding, a rehearsal dinner, or a private celebration, our venues provide an unforgettable setting. Business Services Concierge Fitness Center Free Internet Access Free Parking Meeting Facilities Valet Parking Resort Property Restaurant On-Site Room Service Pamper your pup at The Chatwal Lodge with a plush, luxe Pendleton dog bed, feeding and drinking dishes and special treats. There is no weight restriction for pets. *We welcome guests with disabilities traveling with their service animals. Service animals are not pets and are not subject to this Pet Policy. For more information, please contact the hotel. We are committed to providing equal access and opportunity for individuals with disabilities. The features also make this hotel more accessible for older individuals with changing abilities to ensure a seamless experience. Our overall goal is to improve usability throughout the hotel for all guests. Parking & Transportation Get a break from everyday life amid the tranquil surroundings of the Catskills. Plan a day of fly-fishing or boating, visit Bethel Woods Center for the Arts, play croquet on the lawn, or take yoga or meditation classes in our serene natural setting. Explore All 17.71 Miles away For reservations, please call +1 844-820-0258. Featured review This was by far the most relaxing getaway I have ever been on! My husband and I were celebrating his graduation from his masters program. We were met with complimentary champagne, chocolate, and fruit. The level of service exceeded my expectations, and the staff frequently anticipated our needs - offering suggestions before we could even ask. The food was truly farm to table. Storyteller706243, View All Escape to the heart of the Catskills, where nature sets the pace and every moment is meant to be savored. [Meta Description]
Compare Prices From Top Local Home Water Systems ... Smart, Easy Solutions for Better Water. Custom Treatment Solutions to Fit Your Needs. Trusted Local Experts. Improve Your Wate

[Page Content]
Smart, Easy Solutions for Better Water Custom Treatment Solutions to Fit Your Needs Trusted Local Experts Improve Your Water Quality ZIP Code Water quality impacts everything from taste and comfort to appliance efficiency. Hard water, chemicals, and impurities can lead to dry skin, dull hair, and mineral buildup in plumbing and appliances. Without proper treatment, these issues can affect daily convenience and long-term maintenance. Professional water treatment solutions from professionals near you can improve water quality and provide peace of mind. Whether you’re looking to remove harmful contaminants, eliminate odors, or soften hard water, there’s a solution tailored to your needs. Don’t wait for water issues to worsen. Get a free quote today, connect with professionals near you, and enjoy cleaner, healthier water in your home! Start Now Show more info RO systems use a multi-stage filtration process to remove bacteria, viruses, and dissolved solids from water. Ideal for homeowners seeking the highest level of water purity, these systems provide crisp, clean drinking water straight from the tap. Get Quote for Reverse Osmosis (RO) Systems A whole-home water filtration system removes contaminants like chlorine, sediment, and heavy metals from every tap. It typically includes a sediment filter, carbon filter, and optional softener or UV purifier. The benefits include better-tasting water, longer-lasting appliances, and healthier skin and hair. Get Quote for Whole Home Water Systems Filtration systems remove sediments, chlorine, heavy metals, and other contaminants from your water. Available in whole-home or under-sink options, these systems enhance water taste and clarity while reducing impurities. Get Quote for Water Filtration Systems Hard water can cause scale buildup in pipes, stain fixtures, and reduce appliance efficiency. Water softeners remove excess minerals like calcium and magnesium, helping to protect your plumbing system and extend the life of your water-using appliances. Get Quote for Water Softeners UV systems use ultraviolet light to disinfect water by eliminating bacteria, viruses, and pathogens. You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

Basement cracks can cause leaks in the walls and foundation, leading to costly repairs. Fortunately, our professional waterproofing contractors specialize in installing sump pumps, waterproofing systems, and crawl space repair to prevent leaks and keep homes dry. If you're looking for a reliable and experienced company to handle your basement waterproofing needs, our qualified contractors are ready to provide top-notch service, fix your foundation, and waterproof your basement! Use interior basement waterproofing to effectively manage water under your floor before it touches your living space. Read More Take pressure off your foundation and direct water away from your basement walls with preventative exterior waterproofing. Then you need to discover our basement waterproofing services! We are a team of expert contractors who specialize in waterproofing basements and fixing any leak or moisture problem. We offer sump pump installation, foundation repair, and crawl space encapsulation to make sure your basement stays dry and secure for years to come. Our team uses only the best materials and techniques to seal and protect your basement from moisture. And the best part is, we offer free estimates to all of our customers! So why wait? Let us take care of the job and make sure your basement stays dry and energy efficient. Fight high water tables and poor drainage by using a sump pump to move standing water away from your home. Discover drain systems that can defend your basement or crawl space from water seepage. Divert water away from your foundation with easy to install gutter extensions. Secure the structural integrity of your home—get the help of a professional to repair cracks in basement walls. Ensure that your home is structurally sound by having our professionals analyze and repair your foundation. Add more space and value to your home with clean and quality work from our team of professionals. Poured concrete floors and walls are a durable and versatile option for finishing your basement. View all the services LeBlanc Basement Waterproofing has to offer Do you have a wet basement or a leaky basement issue? From crack repair and foundation work to sump pump replacements and crawl space repair, our experienced and fully licensed contractors are here to help! Look no further! In my honest opinion, LeBlanc’s is the ONLY choice when it comes to a dry basement! I just bought my first house, and I was devastated to find water in my basement, after I’ve been told that there were no issues with the basement flooding. I got several quotes from different local basement waterproofing companies, but the one that stood out was LeBlanc’s. He seemed far more knowledgeable than the other companies, about what needed to be done, and he got his crew out here ASAP. I’m glad I trusted my gut, no regrets on this one! Mia Wharff We had water coming into our basement every time there was a rainstorm. Since we had work done by Corey and his crew at LeBlanc Basement Waterproofing, we have not had a drop of water in our basement since. They installed an interior system on the unfinished side of the basement and an exterior system on the finished side, so we didn't have to tear apart our finished basement. Saved us a ton of money! Extremely satisfied customer! James Pratt We just had a new French drain, sump pump system and vapor barrier installed by LeBlanc Basement Waterproofing and couldn't be happier! The crew was timely, efficient, effective and communicative. Corey came by within days of us calling and looking for help and wrote up the initial proposal. He was kind and easy to work with. The crew who did the work included Mike, Nate and the crew lead Zach and we highly recommend asking for them when you need work done! The website photos are EXACTLY what you get and the system is running flawlessly. Thanks again to Corey and his team, we are so glad we chose to go with you! DJ Oleski I hired LeBlanc's because my basement flooded every time we got a downpour. Not only was his quote beyond reasonable, but his knowledge was impressive! Paxton and his crew came out and finished the job a day ahead of schedule, and my basement has been dry ever since! BEST investment I've ever made! Richard Albert Highly recommend LeBlanc waterproofing. Corey and the team are very professional and easy to work with. They do high quality work and are responsive to customer questions. Charlie Cimet I spoke with a few different companies and after meeting with Corey I knew I was in good hands. Harry Sthilaire LeBlanc Basement Waterproofing will travel up to two hours from Ashburnham, MA. This includes all of Massachusetts and parts of New Hampshire, Vermont, Connecticut, and Rhode Island. Our waterproofing services can help you repair any leak and keep your basement dry. From sump pump installation to foundation solutions to crawl space encapsulation, we have the solutions you need to seal and protect your home from moisture. Our experienced contractors use top-notch service, materials, and techniques to make sure your basement stays dry and efficient, and we'll never cut corners. Plus, we offer free estimates to all of our customers for any service or system you require. Don't let a wet basement ruin your home. Let us help with our indoor and outdoor waterproofing services. Contact LeBlanc Basement Waterproofing to keep your home and family safe. Call today for a FREE ESTIMATE! A technician in neutral workwear (30s, knee pads, gloves, headlamp) gently rolls a seam, eyes on the task, not at camera. Before/after implied by a small shadowed corner of bare earth receding into blur versus luminous, orderly encapsulation in focus. 35mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, clean lines, realistic lighting, matte whites without glare. Professional yet approachable mood; dry comfort suggested by pristine surfaces. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, safe posture. Clean composition, no clutter. No text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no brand marks, no studio backdrop, no over-saturation.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Interior basement waterproofing install, moment of action: a contractor trowels smooth fresh concrete over a narrow perimeter trench while perforated drain tile and gravel are visible in the soft blur behind. The finished section ahead is neat, level, and dry, with the trench line disappearing into order—before/after implied by wet excavation transitioning to clean patch. 35mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field; focus on the trowel edge, wet cement sheen, and crisp floor edge. Realistic lighting, accurate tool scale, concrete texture, subtle dust and moisture. Technician in gloves and workwear, not looking at camera. Professional, reliable, affordable tone through tidy craftsmanship. Clean, uncluttered scene. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs. No text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no brand marks, no studio backdrop.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Environment-as-outcome: a dry, organized basement after heavy rain. Hero focus on a flawless poured concrete floor with a flush sump pump lid and neatly routed discharge pipe; cardboard boxes and a bike rest confidently on the floor. In the softly blurred background, a couple in casual clothes walks through, glancing at the dry floor, not at camera. Warm, practical light, cozy but not staged. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field; crisp details on floor texture and sump cover, gentle bokeh on walls. Professional, trustworthy, affordable vibe via simple, tidy space—no luxury cues. Realistic materials, clean composition, uncluttered background. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs. No text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no brand marks, no studio backdrop, no over-saturation.</Prompt5>

system:
You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

On-screen: vibrant brush strokes and geometric shapes only—no UI elements, no icons, no text. A right hand with trimmed nails and light sleeve rests naturally on the screen edge; correct anatomy, natural fingers, relaxed posture; no face visible. Clean composition, realistic lighting, subtle environmental reflections.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>Bright home workspace. Microsoft Surface Pro (11th Edition) on a dining table in tablet mode with built‑in kickstand stable at a comfortable angle; detachable keyboard set aside. 35mm prime, f/2.8 shallow depth; device sharp, background softly blurred. On-screen: a video call grid of abstract, softly colored silhouettes—no faces, no names, no UI chrome, no text. A mid‑30s person (light-brown skin tone, simple tee) sits behind the device, looking at the screen, not the camera; correct anatomy, natural hands lightly clasped. Morning window light, gentle reflections on PixelSense glass. Premium, professional vibe, uncluttered scene, matte finishes. No logos, no watermark, no extra text, no visible branding, no floating devices, no studio backdrop. Natural perspective, clean composition, realistic reflections.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Top‑down flat lay of a Microsoft Surface Pro (11th Edition) on a warm wood desk. Detachable keyboard slightly offset; stylus pen magnetically docked along the edge. 50mm prime, overhead, f/2.8; crisp focus on the device, soft falloff at the edges. On-screen: neatly arranged color blocks suggesting notes and a calendar—no text, no icons, no UI chrome. Surroundings minimal: plain notebook, unbranded mug, black glasses—balanced, uncluttered. Premium aluminum texture, precise kickstand line visible. No logos, no watermark, no extra text, no visible branding, no floating devices, no studio backdrop. Clean composition, realistic shadows, subtle reflections on PixelSense glass.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Airport lounge at dusk. Microsoft Surface Pro (11th Edition) on a traveler’s lap, detachable keyboard attached, kickstand set to a stable wedge for lap typing; stylus pen resting along the top edge. 35mm prime, f/2.8 shallow depth; device in sharp focus, window view with motion‑blurred runway lights softly bokeh’d. User (early 40s, medium build, navy blazer, minimal makeup) looks at the screen, not the camera; correct anatomy, natural hand posture on backlit keys. Screen shows structured, non-readable blocks—no text, no icons, no UI chrome. Premium materials, precise edges, realistic reflections on PixelSense glass. No logos, no watermark, no extra text, no visible branding, no floating devices, no studio backdrop. Clean composition, natural perspective, uncluttered scene.</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

<Prompt1>A dynamic side view of a woman carving downhill on a snowy mountain. A vivid orange ski jacket dominates the frame as she passes close by, its taped seams dotted with tiny beads of snow and the adjustable hood snug against the wind. A hint of the powder skirt shows as she leans into the turn. She wears goggles and looks down the slope, posture athletic and relaxed, with gloved hands and arms naturally set for balance. The overcast sky gives soft, even light, and the spray of snow behind her dissolves into a gentle blur. The jacket appears crisp and detailed, with dense fabric texture and matte zippers and snaps that feel sturdy against the cold. Distant riders and trees fade softly in the background, while the bright orange stands clear against the gray-white slope. The moment feels candid and outdoors, an open, uncluttered mountain scene with space around her and a calm, documentary presence.</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>A candid dusk rain scene on a city street. A woman in her mid-thirties steps across a crosswalk, head slightly bowed against the drizzle, not looking toward the viewer. She wears a black quilted hooded coat; rain beads across the water-repellent fabric and gathers along the stitching, while the smooth metal zipper pull catches a warm glint from the streetlights. She lifts both hands to adjust the hood, fingers lightly gripping the edge, posture relaxed and in motion.  Warm halos from streetlights and car tail-lights glow behind her, softly blurred to create gentle depth. The wet pavement holds dim reflections and faint streaks of color, with small ripples where her steps meet shallow puddles. Natural shadows shape the folds of the coat, and the quilting texture is clearly visible. Her makeup is neutral and understated, with a practical everyday look and wind-touched hair beneath the hood. The background stays quiet—buildings and passing cars fall into soft focus—keeping the scene calm and true to an on-location moment in the rain.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>An extreme close-up of a creamy beige teddy fleece coat collar being tugged higher against a cold morning. A hand gently adjusts the neckline, fingers sinking into the plush fibers, which appear crisp and tactile as they catch the cool daylight. A faint breath mist hangs in the air, hinting at the chill. Behind the subject, a park path and bare winter branches slip into a smooth, quiet blur, keeping attention on the fabric. Colors are natural and subdued, with lifelike skin tones and soft shadows shaping the collar and seam. The face stays out of view, and the moment feels candid and practical—cozy, simple warmth in a calm outdoor setting.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>A mint ski jacket rests over a simple wooden chair at the center of an après-ski lodge scene, the fabric still damp from the snow. Tiny melted droplets bead and glisten along the sleeve in the warm glow of the interior lights. A small lift pass pocket and the snow gaiter are subtly visible, hinting at its practical design. Through a frosted window, distant mountains appear softly blurred. In the background, a woman, out of focus, removes her gloves with an easy, natural motion, her attention elsewhere. The jacket is in clear focus, showing the weave of the fabric, matte zippers, gentle creases, and a faint sheen where moisture lingers. Warm amber light falls across the wood, with soft shadows adding depth to the quiet room, and the cool mint color stands out against the cozy tones of the lodge.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Soft morning light spills into a tidy entryway, casting gentle highlights across a classic black quilted hooded coat hanging on a wooden peg within easy reach. The quilting and smooth fabric show a subtle sheen where the light skims, with neat stitching and a sturdy hood that feel ready for everyday wear. A woman in casual clothes reaches for the coat in side profile, not looking at the camera, keys and a dog leash gathered in her other hand with a natural, relaxed grip. The coat is the visual anchor, crisp and clear while houseplants and the doorframe soften into a quiet blur, with mild shadows giving depth to the scene. Wood grain, the glint of the keys, and the texture of the leash appear true to color, capturing a calm, lived-in moment just before heading out.</Prompt5>

Did you know doctors have been treating edema the exact same way for nearly 80 years? Yep. Eight decades… and almost nothing has changed. Meanwhile, in every other area of medicine, we’ve seen tremendous progress: Antibiotics were discovered. Organ transplants became routine. Bypass surgery has saved millions of lives. But when it comes to edema? Doctors are still recommending the same old tired “solution” — water pills. Even worse? This approach is based on a theory from over 120 years ago! But Kevin Sorbo, a well-known actor and advocate for natural health, believes mainstream medicine has had it completely wrong — and he’s ready to prove it. After overcoming a life-threatening stroke through natural solutions, Kevin has uncovered a breakthrough study that turns the old theory upside down. Revealing that the swelling in your legs, feet, and ankles isn’t even water at all. You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>

SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>

[Visual Title]
The New Nesans

[Heading]
Built for Today. Engineered for Tomorrow. From Rock to Result — We Engineer the Difference Crushing and Screening Washing and Scrubbing Feeding and Conveying Recycling & Reclamation Why Choose NESANS? Engineering-Led Innovation Global Standards, Indian Excellence Complete Plant Solutions Reliable Service & Support Sustainability Built In Process-First Thinking nes- ON asset-management platform

[Title (CB)]
nesans india crushing screening washing conveying and recycling solutions provider

[Best Snippet (CB)]
From Rock to Result — We Engineer the Difference. Nesans is a next-generation engineering company delivering cutting-edge solutions for the aggregates, minerals, silica sand, an

[Meta Description]
Leading crusher, screen & washing plant manufacturer in India. Custom aggregate processing, mineral processing & recycling equipment. ISO certified. Expert support.

[Page Content]
NESANS Home Products Plants Industries About Contact Career Blog Resources Nesans is evolving — with intelligent machinery, sustainable systems, and a vision that scales beyond boundaries. Explore Machines See the Transformation Nesans is a next-generation engineering company delivering cutting-edge solutions for the aggregates, minerals, silica sand, and recycling industries. Our equipment lineup — from crushers and screens to full-scale washing and conveying systems — is trusted by clients across India and international markets. Rooted in Coimbatore, we combine deep process expertise with continuous innovation to design machinery that powers critical material processing operations. Whether you're scaling production, upgrading efficiency, or building a new plant, Nesans is your partner in performance — built for today, engineered for tomorrow. Jaw Crusher Cone Crusher HSI and VSI Crushers Inclined and Horizontal Screens Vibrating Feeders Know More Sand Washers Super Fine Classifiers Attrition Scrubbers Clarifiers and Thickeners Dewatering Screens Log Washers Grizzly Feeder Bet Feeder Stockpile Conveyors Radial Stackers Conveyor Idlers and Pulleys Accessories Municipal Solid Waste Construction, Demolition and Excavation Waste Soil Remidiation Waste Glass Recycling Foundry Sand Recycling Every Nesans machine is built with precision and performance in mind — designed by engineers who understand the challenge. We build machines in India that meet and exceed international benchmarks — and ship them across the world. From crushers to classifiers — we provide fully integrated process lines tailored to your needs. We Process everything from Rock to Tailings. Your success doesn't end with delivery. We offer rapid-response service, expert training, and spare parts support. Nesans systems reduce water use, improve energy efficiency, and support material recovery and recycling. We don't just sell machines — we solve problems with deep understanding of material behavior and flow. nes-ON gives you a live window into every crusher, screen and washer on site – production stats, downtime reasons, predictive maintenance and auto-generated analytics dashboards. All in real time, from any device. Instant equipment status & alarms Maintenance logging with push reminders Production analytics – daily, weekly, monthly One-tap SOS / E-stop escalation Book a Demo Nesans Mining and Automation Private Limited SF No 20/1, Eachanary Madukkarai Road, Madukkarai, Coimbatore, Tamilnadu 641024 info@nesansindia.in PRODUCTS Crushers Screens Washers Scrubbing Feeding Conveying Recycling INDUSTRIES Aggregates Mining Glass and Foundry Sand QUICK LINKS Service & Support Careers Company Management Presence Culture Privacy Policy Site Map © 2026 Nesans Mining and Automation Private Limited Leading crusher, screen & washing plant manufacturer in India. Custom aggregate processing, mineral processing & recycling equipment. ISO certified. Expert support.

<think>
ProductType: Physical Product
SpecificProduct: Industrial crushing, screening, washing, and conveying equipment with turnkey aggregate processing plants
Category: Industrial machinery
VisualAnchors: heavy-duty crushers and screens; conveyor belts/radial stackers; wash plant clarifiers and thickeners
LifestyleVibe: engineering-driven heavy-industry efficiency
CoreValueSignals: - professional   - reliable   - efficient
</think>
<Prompt1>Late afternoon at an active quarry where heavy-duty jaw and cone crushers feed a radial stacker building an even conical stockpile of graded aggregate. The eye is drawn to the smooth stream of crushed rock arcing from the conveyor and landing in a steady ring, while rough boulders in the foreground rest in cool shadow and the finished pile glows in warm sunlight. A fine dust-suppression mist hangs in the air and catches the low light in tiny sparkles. Two operators in high-visibility gear with helmets, gloves, and ear protection stand at a safe distance, relaxed and focused on the process, not engaging with the camera. Steel surfaces show realistic wear, with bolted guarding and grated walkways in place, and the proportions read true to scale, conveying a well-run, hazard-controlled site. Warm, earthy colors and long, soft shadows add depth, and the surroundings remain tidy so attention stays on the machinery and the flowing material. The main action is clear and detailed, while distant elements gently soften, giving a calm impression of steady, efficient work.</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>A tight close-up of an inclined vibrating screen deck at work, showing three clean streams of aggregate peeling away across wire mesh and dark rubber panels. The graded stones are evenly sized and fall in separate ribbons onto individual conveyors below, with the lines of separation crisp and easy to read. In the background, the raw mixed feed appears softly blurred as it approaches the deck, hinting at the before-and-after of the process. Soft daylight provides even illumination and gentle shadows, catching a light haze of dust in the air. Metal surfaces show a natural sheen and precise edges; bolts, wear liners, and mesh intersections display clear threads, scuffs, and subtle abrasion. The foreground hardware and flowing material are sharply focused while the surroundings fall away into a smooth blur, giving a clear sense of depth without clutter. Texture is tangible in the grains, rubber ridges, and wire, and scale is grounded by the size of the fasteners against the mesh. The scene feels orderly and steady, with each stream running true, conveying quiet, dependable industrial efficiency.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>An operating wash plant clarifier and thickener at dawn, with the clear overflow weir on the right catching pale blue morning light. Clean water spills over with a bright glint and gentle ripples, while on the left a muddy slurry inlet churns, showing the before-and-after contrast within the same view. Rake arms, piping, and laddered walkways look sturdy and well-guarded, their brushed steel and smooth polymer liners carrying a faint, damp sheen. Two engineers in their thirties or forties stand on the walkway in high-visibility jackets, helmets, and gloves; they face the process and confer quietly, one pointing to a gauge with focused, practical posture. Soft, cool light creates crisp highlights on metal and subtle reflections across the water, with natural shadows shaping the tanks and rails. The crystal-clear overflow in the foreground appears sharply defined, while the background equipment falls gently out of focus, giving a realistic sense of depth. The scene feels orderly and dependable, with accurate scale and a tidy, working environment that presents the plant as efficient and trustworthy.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>A side view of a recycling facility processing construction waste under a gray, overcast sky. A heavy-duty feeder drops mixed debris onto vibrating screens, sending material along conveyors where overhead magnets lift rebar into a separate chute. At the end of the line, a radial stacker lays down a neat, conical stockpile of clean aggregates, with tidy piles of sorted material nearby. The contrast between rough incoming rubble and the refined stone exiting the system suggests a clear before-and-after flow.  An operator in his forties, wearing a high-visibility jacket, helmet, and gloves, stands at a safe distance and signals to a loader, focused on the work and not the camera. Safety guards and handrails are properly fitted along the platforms, with painted edges and bolted panels visible.  Cool, even light softens shadows and reveals the textures of steel, rubber belts, and dusty concrete. Slight motion blur on the moving belt conveys steady kinetic energy while the machinery remains clearly defined. Muted colors and an open yard in the background keep attention on the organized stockpiles and the efficient rhythm of the operation.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>A calm, documentary view of an integrated aggregate plant, seen straight on with the process line reading clearly from the primary crusher through the secondary crusher, across tall multi-deck screens, into a rinse station, and out along the conveyors to a neat pile of clean sand. The central path is crisply focused while the distant quarry rim falls softly out of focus, giving a natural sense of depth. Bright overcast daylight bathes the steel structures in even light, with soft shadows and subtle highlights on painted panels, galvanized railings, and bolted joints; damp surfaces glisten around the wash station and a fine spray from dust suppression nozzles hangs in the air. Material moves steadily along the belts—dark raw rock entering at the feed end, pale, well-rinsed sand pouring from the final chute. Protective guarding, covers, and safety rails are plainly visible around moving parts, and the equipment looks sturdy, well-maintained, and purpose-built. The background stays simple and uncluttered, with the quarry walls and rim gently blurred, keeping attention on the continuous, orderly flow of the plant.</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

- Be <=150 words

mc250001 prestige domestic cleaning

There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only

[Page Content]
Click Here - To Get Your Immediate Online Quote At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we offer more than just a cleaning service. We deliver a bespoke experience tailored to the specific needs of your home. From meticulous attention to detail to eco-friendly cleaning products, our service is designed for those who want nothing but the best for their home. We specialise in ensuring your home, along with your cherished posessions, furniture and finishes, are treated with the care they deserve. We focus on delivering impeccable results, with every corner of your home cleaned to perfection. No detail is too small and nothing is overlooked. Our highly trained and vetted team operates with discretion and professionalism, ensuring both your privacy and home are always secure. Get An Immediate Online Quote Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. “I believe that your home is more than just a house – it’s a reflection of your lifestyle, your achievements and the environment you cherish most. That’s why I started this company: to offer a service that goes beyond the ordinary and focuses on delivering the exceptional care and attention that your home truly deserves.” At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we believe that a luxury service should come with a luxury experience. That’s why we’ve streamlined our process to ensure every step is simple, seamless and tailored to your needs. From the initial consultation to delivering immaculate results, we take care of everythin so you can enjoy your beautifully maintained home without having to lift a finger. Simply click the button that will take you to an onine form for you to fill in. The form will ask you for some basic information about you, your home and the cleaning services you want. Click submit and you’ll receive an email with your quote. You’ll receive a link to book your free, no obligation ‘Home Cleaning Assessment’ at a time that suits. During this consultation, we’ll assess your home, discuss your specific cleaning requirements, and tailor a personalised cleaning plan just for you. After the consultation, we create a detailed cleaning plan that’s specifically designed for you. Whatever type of cleaning service you need, we’ll work together to create a cleaning plan that fits your needs on a schedule that’s right for you and your home. Our experienced and highly trained team arrives at your home to carry out the agreed clean. We work with the utmost professionalism, ensuring minimal disruption to your routine. When we’re finished, your home will be immaculately clean. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, click the button below to contact us. Contact Us Our commitment to perfection doesn’t end when we leave. If you’ve scheduled regular cleanings, we’ll continue to maintain your home’s beauty and elegance on a schedule that works for you. We also welcome your feedback and will adjust our services to meet your evolving needs. Click Here - Book Your Free Cleaning Assessment Trusted by Luxury Home Owners all over Wiltshire “Their attention to detail is second to none and I trust them implicitly with my most prized possessions. It’s rare to find a company that understands the needs of luxury homeowners like they do. Thank you” Emma “The team at Prestige Domestic Cleaning are true professionals. From the first consultation to the ongoing service, I’ve been impressed with their discretion, reliability, and flawless results.” James “We use Prestige Domestic Cleaning to keep our holiday home in the Cotswolds clean and tidy. Their service is impeccable, they’re discreet, professional and always leave our home in perfect condition.” Charlotte & William There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only employ cleaners on a permenant basis. This means that we don’t use contract cleaners (on zero hours contracts) or self employed cleaners who work for themselves. Below are some of the benefits you will get by using us to clean your home over cleaning franchises (such as Molly Maid or Maid2Clean) and stand alone self employed cleaners. All our expert cleaners are permenant and fully employed by the company. This means that you will get a consistent service and full accountability for that service by our cleaners. We don’t use contract cleaners, like most franchise cleaning companies (MollyMaid/Maid2Clean etc.). This means that we can provide fully trained and experienced cover so you never miss a clean. All our expert cleaners go through our bespoke and comprehensive training programme. They’re also required to pass regular training updates and assessments. This means you’ll get the best cleaners in the industry. Because we don’t use contract cleaners, rather, we employ them. This means that we can train our expert cleaners to the highest standards of technique, care, conduct and behaviour. You will receive a consistently high service, no matter who visits your home. Our expert cleaners are specifically trainined to clean high end fixtures, fittings and furniture. This means that your antiques, furniture, premium surfaces (such as marble or teak surfaces) and fine art, are cared for to the highest standard. We understand that we are in a very privilaged position when we enter your home to clean. We make sure that all our cleaners are fully DBS checked and vetted before they’re employed. We can also sign any NDS or other non-disclosure documents. Would you like one of our cleaning experts to visit you and discuss your home’s unique cleaning requirements and provide you with a quote? If the answer is ‘YES’ then click the button below and pick a time and date that’s convenient to you. Click Here Your 30 minute Home Cleaning Assessment Visit helps us to understand your unique cleaning needs and provide a tailored cleaning plan, just for you and your home. After you’ve received your online quote and you’re happy to proceed, you will be invited to book a cleaning assessment visit at a date and time that’s convenient to you. During this visit, one of our luxury cleaning experts will accompany you on a ‘walk through’ of your home to: Assess each room’s specific cleaning requirements. Identify any surfaces, furniture, fixtures or fittings that require specialist cleaning. Discuss your unique preferences, such as depth of cleaning required, frequency, discretion and security. This personalised approach ensures that we deliver the highest level of care and attention to every detail, leaving your home impeccably clean and your expectations exceeded. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, fill out the form below to contact us.

Subtle steam haze catches light, revealing a pristine, streak-free finish. 50mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, realistic reflections with no warping, accurate skin and materials, clean composition, uncluttered background. Premium, reliable, meticulous professionalism expressed through flawless surfaces. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no floating objects, correct anatomy, natural hands, high-resolution realism.</Prompt4>

Eco-friendly caddy (amber bottles, folded microfiber cloths) rests neatly by the console. 35mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, natural daylight, accurate shadows, clean composition, uncluttered background. We also welcome your feedback and will adjust our services to meet your evolving needs. Click Here - Book Your Free Cleaning Assessment Trusted by Luxury Home Owners all over Wiltshire “Their attention to detail is second to none and I trust them implicitly with my most prized possessions. It’s rare to find a company that understands the needs of luxury homeowners like they do. Thank you” Emma “The team at Prestige Domestic Cleaning are true professionals. From the first consultation to the ongoing service, I’ve been impressed with their discretion, reliability, and flawless results.” James “We use Prestige Domestic Cleaning to keep our holiday home in the Cotswolds clean and tidy. Their service is impeccable, they’re discreet, professional and always leave our home in perfect condition.” Charlotte & William There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only employ cleaners on a permenant basis. This means that we don’t use contract cleaners (on zero hours contracts) or self employed cleaners who work for themselves. Below are some of the benefits you will get by using us to clean your home over cleaning franchises (such as Molly Maid or Maid2Clean) and stand alone self employed cleaners. All our expert cleaners are permenant and fully employed by the company. This means that you will get a consistent service and full accountability for that service by our cleaners. We don’t use contract cleaners, like most franchise cleaning companies (MollyMaid/Maid2Clean etc.). This means that we can provide fully trained and experienced cover so you never miss a clean. All our expert cleaners go through our bespoke and comprehensive training programme. They’re also required to pass regular training updates and assessments. This means you’ll get the best cleaners in the industry. Because we don’t use contract cleaners, rather, we employ them. This means that we can train our expert cleaners to the highest standards of technique, care, conduct and behaviour. You will receive a consistently high service, no matter who visits your home. Our expert cleaners are specifically trainined to clean high end fixtures, fittings and furniture. This means that your antiques, furniture, premium surfaces (such as marble or teak surfaces) and fine art, are cared for to the highest standard. We understand that we are in a very privilaged position when we enter your home to clean. We make sure that all our cleaners are fully DBS checked and vetted before they’re employed. We can also sign any NDS or other non-disclosure documents. Would you like one of our cleaning experts to visit you and discuss your home’s unique cleaning requirements and provide you with a quote? If the answer is ‘YES’ then click the button below and pick a time and date that’s convenient to you. Click Here Your 30 minute Home Cleaning Assessment Visit helps us to understand your unique cleaning needs and provide a tailored cleaning plan, just for you and your home. After you’ve received your online quote and you’re happy to proceed, you will be invited to book a cleaning assessment visit at a date and time that’s convenient to you. During this visit, one of our luxury cleaning experts will accompany you on a ‘walk through’ of your home to: Assess each room’s specific cleaning requirements. Identify any surfaces, furniture, fixtures or fittings that require specialist cleaning. Discuss your unique preferences, such as depth of cleaning required, frequency, discretion and security. This personalised approach ensures that we deliver the highest level of care and attention to every detail, leaving your home impeccably clean and your expectations exceeded. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, fill out the form below to contact us.

From small residential yards to large commercial estates, our team ensures that every project is completed with care, efficiency, and environmental responsibility. Free Estimates Over 32 Years of Experience Bilingual in English and Spanish Request Estimate When storms strike or trees become hazardous, Greentree's emergency tree removal service provides you with immediate assistance to protect your property and loved ones. Rely on us for 24/7 service. As a master arborist in Upper Marlboro, MD, we understand that emergencies require both speed and precision. Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service

- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints

- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

The more the activities there are throughout Berlin, the faster the hotels fill up and the higher the rates. Located in the heart of Berlin, 8.3 miles from Berlin airport and 0.3 miles from the metro station, the Park Inn by Radisson Berlin Alexanderplatz features luxury soundproofed rooms with safes, Wi-Fi, and fine touches like rainfall shower heads. At the Novotel Berlin Mitte Hotel you'll find spacious family rooms and a kid's play area complete with a gift on arrival. This pet-friendly hotel is 0.3 miles from the subway station and 10 minutes from Potsdamer Platz. The hotel is conveniently located on Berlin's shopping haven of Kurfurstendamm and only 1.7 miles from the Zoologischer train station. Casa Camper, tucked in Berlin's Hackescher Markt neighborhood features naturally lit designer rooms. At night, head over to the Tentempie Lounge on the top floor of the hotel where panoramic views of the city will awe you as you indulge your taste buds. Tasteful rooms and marble bathrooms, minibars and iPads are the norms at the Hotel Adlon Kempinski Berlin. Just 2 minutes from the Brandenburg Gate and 3 minutes from the Berlin wall, this hotel's opulent rooms with fine views of the city are ideal for the utmost in luxury relaxation. The Ritz-Carlton Berlin features contemporary finishes and plush rooms, chic lounges, and fine French dining for the sophisticated palette. The hotel is conveniently located a minute away from the Sony Center and Potsdamer U- and S-Bahn metro stations. Looking for cheap Berlin vacation packages? Visit the Ibis budget hotel Kurfuerstendamm, located 2 minutes from Winttenbergplatz U-Bahn station. Cityhostel Berlin is located in Berlin's vibrant Mitte district and features rooms that sleep up to 8 with private or shared bathrooms, lockers, free Wi-Fi and breakfast at an additional fee. It features express check-in and check-out, free buffet breakfast, and free parking for the duration of your stay. Berlin getaways with a family are ideal at the Scandic Hotel. A Scandinavian design, spacious rooms with wooden floors, French windows and stylish bathrooms with bath or shower give it a stylish touch. Children are treated to a kid-friendly breakfast buffet. At the Novotel Berlin Mitte Hotel you'll find spacious family rooms and a kid's play area complete with a gift on arrival. This pet-friendly hotel is 0.3 miles from the subway station and 10 minutes from Potsdamer Platz. S/O Berlin Das Stue hotel is equipped with an indoor pool, free WiFi in the luxuriously furnished rooms, a spa, and a Michelin star restaurant. The hotel is conveniently located on Berlin's shopping haven of Kurfurstendamm and only 1.7 miles from the Zoologischer train station. Casa Camper, tucked in Berlin's Hackescher Markt neighborhood features naturally lit designer rooms. At night, head over to the Tentempie Lounge on the top floor of the hotel where panoramic views of the city will awe you as you indulge your taste buds. Tasteful rooms and marble bathrooms, minibars and iPads are the norms at the Hotel Adlon Kempinski Berlin. Just 2 minutes from the Brandenburg Gate and 3 minutes from the Berlin wall, this hotel's opulent rooms with fine views of the city are ideal for the utmost in luxury relaxation. The Ritz-Carlton Berlin features contemporary finishes and plush rooms, chic lounges, and fine French dining for the sophisticated palette. The hotel is conveniently located a minute away from the Sony Center and Potsdamer U- and S-Bahn metro stations. Looking for cheap Berlin vacation packages? Visit the Ibis budget hotel Kurfuerstendamm, located 2 minutes from Winttenbergplatz U-Bahn station. This family-friendly establishment is a pleasant 11-minute walk from the Berlin Zoo and features appealing modern rooms with Wi-Fi and flat-screen TVs. Cityhostel Berlin is located in Berlin's vibrant Mitte district and features rooms that sleep up to 8 with private or shared bathrooms, lockers, free Wi-Fi and breakfast at an additional fee. The hotel also rents out bikes for your forays into the city. Our map will help you find the perfect place to stay for your vacation in Berlin by showing you the exact location of each hotel. Complete your trip Hotels Other destinations Flights to Berlin Hotels in Berlin Car rentals in Berlin Vacation rentals in Berlin Top vacation (Flight+Hotel) Family vacation (Flight+Hotel) Romantic vacation (Flight+Hotel) Luxury vacation (Flight+Hotel) Budget vacation (Flight+Hotel) Looking for package deals on your vacation to Berlin? Find Berlin flight + hotel deals. Latest prices for 2 travelers/3 nights: 3-star $127; 4-star $147; 5-star $203 | KAYAK

You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

[Document Title]
Find our best EV Tariffs for your electric vehicle

[Visual Title]
Our best electric vehicle (EV) energy tariff

[Heading]
Fixed tariff came to end good choice of…recommended Very easy to transfer over Some may have had but I haven’t had a bad experience with British Gas Changed to an EV tariff EV tariff - Great Value For Money I’ve tried them all—Eon Agent responses were clear, concise and helpful Tariff change Good company refunded the excess… EV Tariff and excess power payments Recent EV owner New tariff Good company Very good service Very good rates for EV drivers What is an EV tariff and how do they work? Got an EV charger and a home battery? How to apply for an electric vehicle (EV) tariff with British Gas 1. Apply online 2. What you’ll need 3. Confirmation 4. Switch complete How we work out your EV tariff quote Why choose a British Gas EV tariff? EV Power Save more on electricity with our EV tariff Stay on top of your EV energy bill Compare EV charging costs with our EV tariff calculator Select your EV Save on EV Charging at home and on the road Ready to charge your electric vehicle for less? See how much you could save by switching to our EV tariff Service you can rely on Frequently asked questions Can I get an EV tariff without a smart meter? Are EV tariffs good value? Will my daytime electricity rate be higher on the EV tariff to offset the cheaper nighttime rate? How do I sign up for this EV tariff? Does the EV tariff work with Economy 7? Does the EV tariff work with solar panels? Why do I need a smart electricity meter to sign up for the EV tariff? Do I need a smart gas meter to sign up for the EV tariff? What if I want to switch tariffs later? What happens if I move home while I’m on the EV tariff? What if I want to sign up to the EV tariff, but it’s not possible to install smart meters in my home?

[Title (CB)]
find our best ev tariffs for your electric vehicle

[Best Snippet (CB)]
What is an EV tariff and how do they work? EV tariffs are designed for electric vehicle owners who charge their cars at home. Unlike other energy tariffs, EV tariffs work with sma

[Meta Description]
Enjoy cheap electric vehicle charging with British Gas and take advantage of off-peak pricing between 12am-5am. Charge smarter, pay less.

[Page Content]
Got an electric vehicle? Our EV tariff lets you enjoy cheaper EV charging at night at just 9p per kWh between 12am-5am. If you're already with us, it's easy to switch to our EV tariff in your online account. Not with British Gas yet? Get started with a quote. Excellent Based on 320,131 reviews Fixed tariff came to end good choice of fixed tariffs to change to easy pro... paul sansom, June 13 Very easy to transfer over, reason for move to go on ev tariff. Just waitin... Stephen Ross, May 23 I have never had a bad experience with British Gas and have been with them... Mike Trott, April 10 I have just changed our car to an EV . Was informed about the electric vehi... Steven Mellor, January 18 I'm on the EV rate . I'm finding it very economical and I'm very happy wit... Trevor Gridley, January 17 I’ve tried them all—Eon, EDF, Octopus, Npower, Scottish Power—but you just... Iain Corcoran, January 14 Verified Agent was able to resolve configuration questions related to Ev tariff and... D Elderfield, December 10 Changed our tariff to electrical vehicle, went through the British Gas app... shopperlady1960, Good company refunded the excess payments I had made, also great overnight... Paul Rattray, November 12 I recently moved to an EV tariff having bought an electric vehicle. The mov... Mr keith lathwell, October 25 Recently decided on a EV and was able to change myself online to the tariff... Lesley Keene, October 23 My tariff was coming to an end British gas showed me the options with proje... D OWEN, October 8 Redirected Can't fault them to be honest. Been with them a while and using the EV driv... Adrian Craske, July 29 Very good service, upgraded my old nonworking smart meters for free so I ca... Steve, July 22 Very good rates for EV drivers , very helpful advisors and so far have made... Michael Price, June 26 Showing our favorite reviews EV tariffs are designed for electric vehicle owners who charge their cars at home. Unlike other energy tariffs, EV tariffs work with smart meters to offer lower electricity rates during off-peak hours – like the British Gas EV tariff, where you get super-cheap electricity between 12am and 5am every day. The higher daytime rates are balanced out by lower nighttime costs, helping you save money when you charge your EV overnight. If you have both an EV charger and a home battery, Charge Power is the tariff for you. It offers half price electricity from 12am to 5am1 every night and is designed for homes with solar and battery systems. You can charge your EV and your home battery overnight, helping you to save money and lower your carbon footprint. If you’re a new customer, join us on any electricity tariff. Then once we’ve set up your account and connected your smart meter, you can switch to an EV tariff in your online account. If you’re an existing customer, simply login to your online account and change to our EV tariff. An electric vehicle you charge at home. We may ask you to prove this A smart electricity meter. If you don’t have one yet, we’ll take care of that for you for free To pay by Direct Debit We’ll arrange a switch date with your current provider, with no disruption to your energy supply We’ll let you know when your switch to us is complete and when to send us your first meter reading. When you get a quote for our EV tariff, we’ll estimate your annual costs. We base this on how much electricity you’ve used in the past. If we don’t know this, we’ll base it on the average amount EV owners normally use. EV owners typically charge their vehicles about three times a week during off-peak hours, and twice a fortnight during peak hours using 10 kWh of electricity each time. Our estimate assumes that 33% of the total electricity you use is during off-peak hours. Remember that factors like your car’s age, charging habits and how else you use electricity at home could mean your actual yearly costs differ from our estimate. Charging at home is often cheaper than using public charging stations, and the savings get even bigger if you’re on an EV tariff. It works with any make of EV and home charger From 12am-5am every day, you’ll get a super low off-peak price for electricity. That's 35 off-peak hours every week to charge your car for less We keep the daytime rate on our EV tariff as close as possible to our normal electricity rates, so you get great value all day We offer one, easy-to-understand EV tariff designed for all EV drivers 9p per kWh between 12am – 5am There are no rules on what you can use the cut-price electricity for during off-peak hours. So, as well as charging your EV during off-peak hours, you could: Use higher-energy appliances, like washing machines and dishwashers Charge up your smartphones, laptops and tablets Use your charger or EV app to schedule your charges during the cheaper nighttime hours Get a free smart electricity meter upgrade to help keep an eye on your spending Want to know how much you could save with an EV tariff? Our savings calculator does just that. It'll show you the annual and per-charge savings you could make compared to your current electricity tariff, and using public chargers. We'll even show you the estimated reduction in CO2 emissions versus a traditional petrol vehicle. To estimate what you could save, just enter your car model, expected annual mileage, and how much you're currently paying for your electricity (if you’re not sure, we can compare costs to current Ofgem price cap rates). You'll be able to see just how much you can save every time you charge, and what that adds up to over a year. Step 1 of 3 To calculate your estimated EV Tariff savings, first select the make and model of your EV* from the drop-down options below. Select your vehicle make: Peugeot Select your vehicle model: e-5008 *EV vehicle models are up to date as of January 2026. Newer models may not be included in the database. We're making EV charging cheaper for customers who purchase a Hive EV charger, wherever they are. Not only can you enjoy cost-effective charging at home, but we've also partnered with Zapmap, the UK's leading EV public charging service, to take savings beyond your driveway. New customers get £20 in credit, the equivalent to 100 free miles, to use at thousands of public charging points nationwide. We won Best Overall Improvement in the Uswitch Energy Awards 2024 & 2025. That's because we performed best – out of all energy suppliers – at improving our overall customer satisfaction scores this year. You will receive a 50% discount on the tariff unit rate for electricity you usebetween 12am and 5am each day. You will still pay the full daily standing chargeapplicable to your tariff. Tariff prices are subject to change.​ Enjoy cheap electric vehicle charging with British Gas and take advantage of off-peak pricing between 12am-5am. Charge smarter, pay less.

</think>

A relaxed homeowner in her 30s (medium skin tone, cozy sweatshirt, natural hair), sipping tea and looking out the window toward a fully charged EV on the drive; she does not look at the camera. Natural reflections, accurate metal and polymer textures, no visible branding. Clean, minimalist framing, no clutter. No people, no extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, avoid readable screens. Realistic color, no over-sharpening, no artifacts.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>Cozy evening living room, warm lamplight. In the foreground, a window frames the focal point: EV outside connected to a home charger, cable neatly arranged, gentle indicator glow. Inside, a family of three relaxes in soft focus (dad 40s reading, mom late 30s folding laundry, child drawing), candidly engaged, not looking at camera—benefit receivers of quiet, affordable charging. 35mm prime lens, f/2.8 shallow depth of field; crisp focus on the charging scene beyond the glass, interior softly blurred with pleasing bokeh. Natural reflections on the windowpane, accurate skin tones, correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs. Clean, uncluttered setting, no visible branding. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, avoid readable screens. Realistic lighting and materials.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Tidy garage at dawn. Focal point: a slim home battery cabinet and inverter with clean cabling, EV plugged in beside it. Cool night tones fade into warm sunrise through the open door, implying the “after” of a completed off-peak charge. The floor is spotless, tools neatly arranged, everything signals efficient, reliable savings. Dynamic side view, 50mm prime lens, f/2.8 shallow depth of field; sharp focus on battery enclosure and charging cable, soft bokeh on driveway and sky. Subtle surface reflections, accurate textures, no brand marks visible. Natural perspective, clean composition, uncluttered background. No people, no extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, avoid readable screens. Realistic materials, true-to-life color, no over-processing.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Nighttime driveway scene: focal point is an EV plugged into a wall-mounted home charger, LED ring softly glowing, tidy cable looped. Cool blue off-peak moonlight washes the car and charger; through warm-lit windows, a calm, sleeping home. Rooftop solar panels read as a subtle silhouette against the sky. The outcome feels effortless: quiet, affordable overnight charging already in progress. Dynamic side view, 50mm prime lens, f/2.8 shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the port and plug, soft bokeh on house and street. Natural reflections on car paint and charger casing; no visible branding. Realistic materials, true-to-life color, clean composition, uncluttered background. No people, no extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, avoid readable screens. Correct proportions, no distortions, no floating objects.</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Product Functions ◆ Airplane Box Folding Machine: Automatic feeding and folding of airplane boxes ◆ Robot Automatic Loading: Automatically picks and places materials into boxes on the conveyor line / manual loading station optional ◆ Automatic Box Closing Machine: Automatically completes the closing action for airplane boxes ◆ Real-time Printing and Labeling Machine: Prints product information labels and automatically applies them to the top surface of the airplane boxes Automatic Cartoning – Weight Inspection – Three-dimensional Packaging Line This packaging line realizes automatic box packing for strip products, and completes weighing inspection (with automatic rejection), as well as automatic three-dimensional film packaging. ◆ Automatic Box Packing Machine: Automatically opens boxes, packs products into boxes automatically, and seals the boxes after packing is completed. ◆ Weighing Inspection Machine: Automatically inspects packed products. Products that do not meet the weight requirements will be automatically rejected. ◆ Three-dimensional Film Packaging Machine: Using roll film bag-making method, tear lines are automatically applied to the packaging film. After the machine automatically makes bags, it performs three-dimensional film packaging and sealing for the boxes. It is widely used in folding and forming of electronic products, thermos cups, hair dryers, toys, food e-commerce products, cosmetics, medical drugs, auto parts, filters and other industries. system:
You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:

VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>

<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>
