Bestseller 4.8 (2,594 ratings) 13,264 students Created by Mohammad Noori Last updated 4/2013 English English [Auto], Simplified Chinese [Auto] 80% off 3 days left at this price! Add to cart 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee Full Lifetime Access Gift this course Apply Coupon MT260126G2A is applied Udemy coupon Apply Learn how to properly and efficiently conduct a research project, especially for scientific research Learn exactly how to prepare an effective research paper for publication in a scientific journal, archival volume, or other professional publications By following the methods and suggested approaches, you will be able to write an effective and possibly award-winning paper that communicates your findings with your professional community in a clear and organized manner Research Paper Writing Communication Business 5 sections • 32 lectures • 2h 26m total length Expand all sections Instructor Introduction Preview Chapter 1 Overview Defining the Research Question / Theme / Topic Gathering Background Information - Locate Prior Works Gathering Background Information - Read Key Papers Gathering Background Information - Organize References Forming a Hypothesis and an Outline Summarizing the Analysis / Simulation / Experiment Organizing and Interpreting Results Chapter 2 Overview Preliminary Steps Before You Start Paper Structure and Function Title Abstract Key Words Introduction - Overview Introduction - Organization Introduction - First Paragraph Introduction - Middle Paragraphs Introduction - Middle Paragraphs (continued) Introduction - Final Paragraph Introduction - Final Paragraph (continued), and Extra Tips The Methods - Overview The Methods - Examples The Results The Discussion Summary and Conclusion Acknowledgements Appendices References Final Course Review No prior experience in writing a research or technical paper required. This course is equally helpful to beginners as it can help those with some familiarity with research to write more effective research papers. Over the last decade, the expectation for publishing research papers has increased significantly in academia, in professional communities, and in science and technology disciplines worldwide. In scientific fields (especially in academia), both graduate students and faculty are expected to publish the results of their research work in journals and conference proceedings. Publication of research or journal papers has also become a key measure for tenure and promotion assessments. In fact, U.S. News, National Research council, and other external organizations often consider publications as a critical metric in their analysis and ranking of programs and institutions. An increasing number of highly ranked universities, worldwide, now require publication of papers in SCI indexed journals as a per-requisite to receive a doctoral degree. Unfortunately, despite the widespread standard of writing and publishing research papers, most Universities don’t offer any formal training or mentorship on how to write effective papers. The lack of guidance and resources has made it difficult, and at times frustrating, for graduate students and young researchers to properly organize and structure their papers for acceptance into publications. Whether you are a graduate student, conducting research, working towards a tenure, or you would like to advance your professional career in science, technology or academia, you will find this course greatly helpful. You will no longer have to struggle or spend countless hours figuring out how to start your research paper, only to have it turn out not as good as you hoped. If you are a beginner, you can simply follow along with the easy steps outlining each section of your paper; even if you are more experienced, you may be surprised at how much you can improve your research writing technique from the strategies and examples presented in the course videos. This “Writing Research Papers: How to Write Research Paper Effectively” course will provide you with the valuable research guidance from a scholar with over 36 years of experience in research and teaching in higher education. Dr. Mohammad Noori has published over 250 technical and professional papers, 6 advanced level text books, has been the guest editor of over 20 special journal volumes and technical books, and has given over 100 keynote, plenary and invited talks, currently serves as the technical editor, associate editor and a member of the editorial board of several prestigious journals and as a series editor for CRC/Taylor& Francis, and has presented numerous workshops worldwide on this topic. Take this Writing Research Papers course now and learn how to write research paper effectively. In a near future this course will be thoroughly revised to include topics on the latest web-based tools and scholarly resources that provide invaluable resources for conducting research and publishing high quality papers.

Master’s or Doctoral graduate students New faculty members who are expected to publish work in professional publications, journals and proceedings Researchers in industry who are expected to prepare technical papers Any young scholars with limited or no experience in preparing journal and/or technical papers Research Proposal - Write, Defend & Get Your Study Approved 25.5 total hoursUpdated 11/2024 How to Write a Successful Research Paper 2 total hoursUpdated 4/2025 How to Write a Research Paper? | Masterclass for Beginners 2 total hoursUpdated 8/2024 Publish Your Research In Academic Journals And Conferences 9 total hoursUpdated 11/2024 Masterclass: How to Research for Academic Writing 4.5 total hoursUpdated 11/2023 How to Write a Scientific Paper for High Ranked Journals 2.5 total hoursUpdated 2/2025 Academic writing: How to write a Thesis or a Research Paper 3.5 total hoursUpdated 5/2025 Writing & Publishing a Research Paper - Research Paper Guide 1.5 total hoursUpdated 9/2020 Comprehensive Guide to Completing a Dissertation Highest Rated 3 total hoursUpdated 12/2022 Writing Winning Research Papers 6 total hoursUpdated 8/2021 Pass Your Thesis, Dissertation Or Postgraduate Final Report 18.5 total hoursUpdated 11/2024 How to write an excellent research thesis 3 total hoursUpdated 4/2024 The Ultimate Research MasterClass 8.5 total hoursUpdated 11/2022 Research Methodology 3 total hoursUpdated 7/2019 Writing a scientific research article 1 total hourUpdated 4/2022 Research Project Writing 3 total hoursUpdated 6/2019 How to Write a Research Proposal: A Step-By-Step Guide 4.5 total hoursUpdated 12/2025 How to Get Your Research Paper Published 1 total hourUpdated 5/2021 Show more Mohammad Noori Dr. Daveena Tauber André Klapper, PhD Total: Add all to cart Professor, Journal Executive Editor, Board Member, Reviewer 4.8 Instructor Rating 14,496 Students 2 Courses Dr. Mohammad Noori who is currently an Emeritus Professor of Mechanical Engineering at California Polytechnic State University and is a Visiting Professor at the University of Leeds, UK. He has over 40 years of experience working in academia and throughout his career he has been honored with numerous recognition for his teaching and research. Some of the noteworthy ones ones include the American Society for Engineering Education (ASEE) Keating Award for Innovation and Leadership in Lifelong Learning in Graduate Engineering Education, and the ASEE Isadore T. Davis National Award for Excellence in Collaboration of Engineering Education and Industry on June 16, 2014, and on June 12, 2012. Dr. Noori has written over 300 research papers in his research area of artificial intelligence based methodologies for structural health monitoring, random vibrations, multifunctional and intelligent structures, and seismic hazard mitigation. He has published 16 advanced level scientific books, and has authors over 40 book chapters in scientific collections. Noori is the founding executive editor of a scientific journal, has been the guest editor of over 30 special volumes and books, serves as the series editor for CRC/Taylor & Francis and De Gruyter Publishers and has presented over 100 invited and keynote talks at numerous international conferences, universities and industry. He has also had the honor of being invited by President Clinton's Special Commission on Critical Infrastructure Protection, as a national expert, to present a Testimony. He has supervised over 100 post-doctoral and graduate students and their research projects, and has held distinguished visiting professorships at several highly ranked universities world-wide. Noori has served as the department head at Worcester Polytechnic Institute, North Carolina State University and as the dean of engineering at California Polytechnic State University Poly, San Luis Obispo. He has spearheaded, and participated in the creation of numerous industry-university-government consortia and global collaborations. He founded and chaired the ASME Committee on Uncertainty and Probabilistics, and has served on, chaired or co-chaired, over 20 scientific and organizing committees of major international conferences. He has also served as a program director at the National Science Foundation, has served as member of the Board of Directors and External Advisory Board of several non-profit, industry and academic organizations, has been a consultant to several Fortune 500 companies, has served as the external examiner for several doctoral committees at a number of international institutions, and has provided expert witness services, in the areas of vibration, structural safety, mechanical failure, product liability, and seismic mitigation. He is also an ABET evaluator representing ASME. Noori is a Fellow and Life Member of the American Society of Mechanical Engineers, has received the prestigious Fellowship of Japan Society for the Promotion of Science, and is a member of Sigma Xi, Pi Tau Sigma, Chi-Epsilon, and Sigma Mu Epsilon honorary societies. He also serving as the Executive Editor of a prestigious scientific journal, as the associate editor of two other international journals, as the chief technical advisor at a technical start-up, and a member of the editorial board of seven other scientific journals. You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service

- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints

- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

MC250001 - Prestige Domestic Cleaning

[Visual Title]
Professional Domestic Cleaners

[Heading]
For Your Home in Malmesbury and Neighbouring Villages ✅Bespoke Home Cleaning Services ✅Trustworthy, Professional & Reliable ✅Immediate Online Quote Click the button ▼ below ▼ to get your free, no obligation onine quote, sent directly to your inbox and see how we can help keep your beautiful home clean and tidy. Trusted by Home Owners all over Wiltshire The Premier Choice If You Love Your Home to be Clean and Tidy Tailored to your Beautiful Home Meticulous Attention to Detail Discreet and Confidential Service Grantley Clapham Founder and Director How it Works It’s as Easy as 1,2,3…. and 4 STEP 1 - Get Your Online Quote STEP 2 - Book a Home Cleaning Assessment STEP 3 - Receive Your Cleaning Plan STEP 4 - Sit Back and Enjoy Flawless Results Ongoing Care and Follow-Up Testimonials Here’s What Our Clients are Saying About Us Why Choose Us This is How We’re Different from Other Domestic Cleaners and Why it Matters Permanent, Fully Employed Staff Holiday and Sick Cover Fully Trained Staff Enhanced Liability Insurance Specialised Luxury Care Confidentiality and Security Want to Find Out How We Can Help? Got More Questions? Here are some of the most popular questions we get from our clients: Please can you tell me more about the Home Cleaning Assessment Visit How do you ensure the security and privacy of my home and belongings? What cleaning products do you use, and are they safe for delicate surfaces? Can I customise my cleaning services to suit my preferences and schedule? What makes Prestige Domestic Cleaning different from other cleaning services? How do you handle fragile or high-value items in my home? What if I’m not home during the cleaning? Are you insured in case of accidents or damage in my home? Are your staff full-time employees or subcontractors?

[Title (CB)]
mc250001 prestige domestic cleaning

[Best Snippet (CB)]
There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only

[Page Content]
Click Here - To Get Your Immediate Online Quote At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we offer more than just a cleaning service. We deliver a bespoke experience tailored to the specific needs of your home. From meticulous attention to detail to eco-friendly cleaning products, our service is designed for those who want nothing but the best for their home. We specialise in ensuring your home, along with your cherished posessions, furniture and finishes, are treated with the care they deserve. We focus on delivering impeccable results, with every corner of your home cleaned to perfection. No detail is too small and nothing is overlooked. Our highly trained and vetted team operates with discretion and professionalism, ensuring both your privacy and home are always secure. Get An Immediate Online Quote Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. “I believe that your home is more than just a house – it’s a reflection of your lifestyle, your achievements and the environment you cherish most. That’s why I started this company: to offer a service that goes beyond the ordinary and focuses on delivering the exceptional care and attention that your home truly deserves.” At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we believe that a luxury service should come with a luxury experience. That’s why we’ve streamlined our process to ensure every step is simple, seamless and tailored to your needs. From the initial consultation to delivering immaculate results, we take care of everythin so you can enjoy your beautifully maintained home without having to lift a finger. Simply click the button that will take you to an onine form for you to fill in. The form will ask you for some basic information about you, your home and the cleaning services you want. Click submit and you’ll receive an email with your quote. You’ll receive a link to book your free, no obligation ‘Home Cleaning Assessment’ at a time that suits. During this consultation, we’ll assess your home, discuss your specific cleaning requirements, and tailor a personalised cleaning plan just for you. After the consultation, we create a detailed cleaning plan that’s specifically designed for you. Whatever type of cleaning service you need, we’ll work together to create a cleaning plan that fits your needs on a schedule that’s right for you and your home. Our experienced and highly trained team arrives at your home to carry out the agreed clean. We work with the utmost professionalism, ensuring minimal disruption to your routine. When we’re finished, your home will be immaculately clean. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, click the button below to contact us. Contact Us Our commitment to perfection doesn’t end when we leave. If you’ve scheduled regular cleanings, we’ll continue to maintain your home’s beauty and elegance on a schedule that works for you. We also welcome your feedback and will adjust our services to meet your evolving needs. Click Here - Book Your Free Cleaning Assessment Trusted by Luxury Home Owners all over Wiltshire “Their attention to detail is second to none and I trust them implicitly with my most prized possessions. It’s rare to find a company that understands the needs of luxury homeowners like they do. Thank you” Emma “The team at Prestige Domestic Cleaning are true professionals. From the first consultation to the ongoing service, I’ve been impressed with their discretion, reliability, and flawless results.” James “We use Prestige Domestic Cleaning to keep our holiday home in the Cotswolds clean and tidy. Their service is impeccable, they’re discreet, professional and always leave our home in perfect condition.” Charlotte & William There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only employ cleaners on a permenant basis. This means that we don’t use contract cleaners (on zero hours contracts) or self employed cleaners who work for themselves. Below are some of the benefits you will get by using us to clean your home over cleaning franchises (such as Molly Maid or Maid2Clean) and stand alone self employed cleaners. All our expert cleaners are permenant and fully employed by the company. This means that you will get a consistent service and full accountability for that service by our cleaners. We don’t use contract cleaners, like most franchise cleaning companies (MollyMaid/Maid2Clean etc.). This means that we can provide fully trained and experienced cover so you never miss a clean. All our expert cleaners go through our bespoke and comprehensive training programme. They’re also required to pass regular training updates and assessments. This means you’ll get the best cleaners in the industry. Because we don’t use contract cleaners, rather, we employ them. This means that we can train our expert cleaners to the highest standards of technique, care, conduct and behaviour. You will receive a consistently high service, no matter who visits your home. Our expert cleaners are specifically trainined to clean high end fixtures, fittings and furniture. This means that your antiques, furniture, premium surfaces (such as marble or teak surfaces) and fine art, are cared for to the highest standard. We understand that we are in a very privilaged position when we enter your home to clean. We make sure that all our cleaners are fully DBS checked and vetted before they’re employed. We can also sign any NDS or other non-disclosure documents. Would you like one of our cleaning experts to visit you and discuss your home’s unique cleaning requirements and provide you with a quote? If the answer is ‘YES’ then click the button below and pick a time and date that’s convenient to you. Click Here Your 30 minute Home Cleaning Assessment Visit helps us to understand your unique cleaning needs and provide a tailored cleaning plan, just for you and your home. After you’ve received your online quote and you’re happy to proceed, you will be invited to book a cleaning assessment visit at a date and time that’s convenient to you. During this visit, one of our luxury cleaning experts will accompany you on a ‘walk through’ of your home to: Assess each room’s specific cleaning requirements. Identify any surfaces, furniture, fixtures or fittings that require specialist cleaning. Discuss your unique preferences, such as depth of cleaning required, frequency, discretion and security. This personalised approach ensures that we deliver the highest level of care and attention to every detail, leaving your home impeccably clean and your expectations exceeded. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, fill out the form below to contact us.

A goat-hair dusting brush lightly lifts dust along the frame’s gilded edge; protective mat underfoot. Antique sideboard and marble-topped console softly gleam. Eco-friendly supplies in amber glass bottles rest on a discreet tray. 35mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, natural daylight, clean composition, correct anatomy, natural hands, minimal makeup. Emphasize discretion, reliability, and premium care without staging. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no harsh contrast, no clutter.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Spa-clean bathroom outcome: Carrara marble vanity and glass shower panels are crystal-clear, with soft water beading and chrome fixtures mirror-bright. Subtle steam haze catches light, revealing a pristine, streak-free finish. 50mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, realistic reflections with no warping, accurate skin and materials, clean composition, uncluttered background. Premium, reliable, meticulous professionalism expressed through flawless surfaces. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no floating objects, correct anatomy, natural hands, high-resolution realism.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>After-service serenity in a Cotswold-stone hallway: sunlit entry with patterned flagstones, a teak console softly glowing, fresh flowers perfectly arranged. Two cleaners (diverse duo, 30s, neat uniforms, shoe covers) are softly blurred in the background, quietly closing the door—discreet exit, no one looking at camera. Eco-friendly caddy (amber bottles, folded microfiber cloths) rests neatly by the console. 35mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, natural daylight, accurate shadows, clean composition, uncluttered background. Emphasize premium reliability through order: aligned boots, spotless skirting, dust-free frames. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, no extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no excessive contrast, high-resolution realism.</Prompt5>

You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>

<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints

- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

VisualAnchors: ...

CoreValueSignals: ...

You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints

<Prompt1>Inside a modern commuter train, late-30s professional (tan skin, business-casual, calm focus) seated by the window, thumb poised over a phone showing an interactive date picker/calendar with color-coded dots and a price alert toggle shape (all UI elements abstracted, no readable text). Early morning light streaks, gentle motion blur outside, budget-savvy efficiency mood. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow DOF; subject sharp, background softly blurred. Correct anatomy, natural hands, realistic skin, subtle reflections on the screen, device held at a natural angle. No direct eye contact with camera. No logos on clothing or train, no watermark, no extra text. Clean composition, uncluttered scene.</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>Golden hour in Jakarta’s Merdeka Square near Monas: two friends (diverse appearances, mid-20s to 30s, casual attire) sharing street snacks, lightweight daypacks at their feet. The atmosphere feels unhurried and affordable, suggesting a smartly booked trip. Warm sunlight, gentle haze, city silhouettes, faint airplane contrail overhead. 35mm prime, f/2.8, shallow DOF; candid interactions, no one looks at the camera. Correct anatomy, natural skin textures, clean composition, uncluttered background. No logos on clothing, no brand marks on stalls, no readable signage, no watermark, no extra text. Emphasize tangible outcome: they’re already there, enjoying Jakarta after finding a transparent, efficient deal.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>Top-down flat lay of a tidy planning scene on a wooden table: phone slightly angled with a clean price trend chart and a monthly calendar (abstract shapes only, no readable text), closed passport, neutral pen, minimalist boarding pass card with blank fields, lightweight sunglasses. Soft daylight, gentle shadows, budget-savvy organization. 50mm equivalent top-down look, crisp focus on the phone, subtle bokeh at edges. Correct perspective, no distortion, realistic reflections on the screen, no floating objects. No logos, no airline marks, no watermark, no extra text. Clean, uncluttered composition that communicates transparent, efficient fare comparison at a glance.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Airport gate lounge, candid side view of a mid-30s traveler (neutral skin tone, smart-casual, relaxed), sipping coffee beside a small carry-on. Phone in hand at a natural slight angle shows a blurred flight search results list with tidy rows and price dots (no readable text). Warm morning light, soft bokeh, calm efficiency vibe. 35mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field, natural perspective. Correct anatomy, natural hands, realistic skin texture, clean composition, uncluttered background. Subtle window reflections on the screen, no floating devices. Distant destination signage softly out of focus hints Jakarta (unreadable). No logos, no brand names, no airline marks, no watermark, no extra text. Emphasize the outcome: traveler looks relieved, already set for an affordable direct flight.</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>Editorial poster-style scene in a limitless, softly lit space: floating frosted-glass tiles form a clear hierarchy—front: a simple calendar grid with a softly highlighted date range; mid: a clean price trend line dipping on specific days; back: three minimal flight rows with neutral circular placeholders. Digital materials (matte acrylic, subtle glow), z-axis depth, gentle rim light. Symmetric, modern, data-driven. 50mm prime look, shallow DOF, crisp edges. No devices, no humans. No readable text, no logos, no watermark. Clean, uncluttered, transparent feeling of savings and clarity. Focus on order, alignment, and affordability implied through the downward price curve and selected dates.</Prompt5>

You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>
<Prompt1>...</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>...</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>...</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>...</Prompt4>
<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

It might not always be standard home insurance that you need. The policy that's right for you will depend on whether you own, rent, or are a landlord for the property you’re insuring. Owning your own property means you’re responsible for everything. Plus if you have a mortgage, it might be a condition that you have at least buildings insurance. Most renters only need contents insurance as building cover is the landlord's responsibility. You might also want your own renters insurance policy if you share your home with other tenants. Landlords are responsible for providing happy homes to their tenants. But to cover your properties, you might need specialist landlord insurance. If you let your property on a short-term basis, either privately or through platforms like Airbnb, you need short-term let insurance rather than standard home cover. Note, a second home can’t be covered by traditional home insurance. Home insurance comes in two parts: buildings insurance and contents insurance. These can be bought individually or together as a single policy. Buildings insurance This covers the structure of the property and its permanent fixtures and fittings, like fitted kitchen units and bathroom suites. It might also provide cover for driveways, patios, walls and fences, and any outbuildings. Contents insurance This covers your household goods, valuables, and personal belongings. This includes things like your home appliances, carpets, furniture and jewellery. The items must belong to yourself, your fellow policyholders, or any other residents insured by the policy. Combined insurance A combined buildings and contents insurance policy covers the structure of your home and your belongings. Read our guide on what home insurance covers for more details. Fire damage - Damage caused by home fires, smoke or explosion. General wear and tear - Damage caused by the general passing of time e.g. worn carpets or loose roof tiles. Theft - The replacement of your possessions if lost during a burglary. Accidental damage - For instance, accidentally drilling through a pipe or spilling a glass of red wine on a rug. Weather damage - Extreme-weather damage such as storms, flooding, hail, and lightning strikes. Mechanical breakdown - Appliances such as fridges or washing machines expiring due to age. Escape of water - Water leaking from burst pipes or appliances. Negligence - If not taking action to repair something leads to more damage. Like not fixing a cracked pipe or damp patch. Malicious damage - Intentional damage to your home, like vandalism, as long as you or anyone staying with you did not cause it. Poor workmanship - Damage that’s caused due to a low standard of building work or DIY, for example sub-par wiring led to a fire. Subsidence, heave or landslip - Damage to your home caused by subsidence, heave or landslip. Empty properties - Unoccupied property cover may be needed as an add-on, as it poses a greater risk of damage or theft. Falling trees - Damage to your home, like broken fences or damaged roof tiles, caused by a tree falling. Loss away from home - Loss of items on your person while you're away from your home Covers the cost of emergency repairs if your boiler breaks down, your pipes burst or your roof falls off. It can also help with broken windows, busted locks and even pest infestations. Home emergency cover Legal expense cover, protects you against the costs of being sued, or when making a claim against someone in court. Legal expense cover can save you a lot Legal expenses cover Covers you for accidental damage to your buildings or contents. Put a foot through the ceiling? Dropped a tin of paint on the carpet? We’ve got you covered. Accidental damage cover Covers your valuables away from the home. If you lose your phone or leave your sunglasses on the train, personal possessions cover can help. Shopping around for quotes isn’t the only way to save on your home insurance. Here's seven more tips that could help keep the cost of your premium down: Overestimating the value of your contents and the rebuild cost of your home will increase your premium. But if you're in any doubt, it's better to overestimate than underestimate. Get insurer-approved locks for your home, as well as smoke and burglar alarm systems. If you pay for your cover by monthly instalments, an interest charge and finance arrangement fee may be added, so it'll be more expensive. Some insurers will apply a discount to your premium based on the number of years you have held insurance but not made a claim. But be aware, as this isn't the case with all insurers, so check your policy details. Increasing your voluntary excess may reduce your premium but in the event of a claim you will have a larger total excess to pay. Check out our tips for cheaper home insurance Recent years have shown a surge in property insurance prices. The rising cost of materials and labour, combined with more severe and extended weather events, means claim costs are rising for UK insurers. And when costs rise, premiums rise with them. With the cost of insuring your home up by 7.5% since 2023, it's vital to get the best deal you can on your home insurance. Accurately valuing your contents, improving your security, and paying annually could maximise your savings to get the best quotes and cover for your needs." But be aware, as this isn't the case with all insurers, so check your policy details. Increasing your voluntary excess may reduce your premium but in the event of a claim you will have a larger total excess to pay. Check out our tips for cheaper home insurance Recent years have shown a surge in property insurance prices. The rising cost of materials and labour, combined with more severe and extended weather events, means claim costs are rising for UK insurers. And when costs rise, premiums rise with them. With the cost of insuring your home up by 7.5% since 2023, it's vital to get the best deal you can on your home insurance. Accurately valuing your contents, improving your security, and paying annually could maximise your savings to get the best quotes and cover for your needs." Nathan Blackler - Home insurance & utilities expert Here’s what customers had to say specifically about our home insurance comparison service on Trustpilot: Competitive prices for home insurance. Wendy Woodward Quick way of finding good value house insurance Rachel Easy to compare options on GoCompare, and benchmark levels of cover. I bought competitive home insurance from a well known insurance broker. Paul Allen Read more reviews We're chuffed to say we've received some snazzy recognition since we started in 2006. Here's a bit more about our awards and accreditations: We’re authorised and regulated by the FCA, which oversees financial services firms and markets in the UK. That means you can compare quotes and get cover with confidence. We hear you - 'But you're not an insurer?' you say. And you're right. But our shared goal of doing right by customers is why we’re the only comparison site to be invited to join them. We work with the IFB to fight against fraud in the insurance industry. We use their specialist fraud intelligence and data to improve our systems and raise awareness of scams. More home insurance guides Join over one million customers getting a home insurance quote with Go.Compare each year. [3] Get quotes Page last reviewed: 04 December 2025 Page reviewed by Tamzin Metcalfe [1] As of 5 January 2026, there are 73 active home insurers on the panel at Go.Compare [2] Based on Trustpilot: Our average rating of 4.8 out of 5 is from 8,621 people who left a review for home insurance comparison only. Last checked 26 November 2025. [3] The median price paid annually for home insurance purchased during 1 July to 30 September 2025 by type of cover. For buildings and contents insurance, it was £225. For buildings insurance only, it was £200. For contents insurance only, it was £64. [4] Based on distinct Go.Compare home insurance quotes made between October 2024 and September 2025 inclusive. Excludes customers where no quote was returned and test quotes. *Gift card issued after sale confirmed. Activate within 90 days and redeem within 10 months. Select providers. 18+ years only. T&Cs apply Buy your home cover with us and you'll get a £50 gift card to spend on your next flight or hotel stay. Save on home insurance from 75 leading providers.

<Prompt1>A practical homeowner (early 30s, medium skin tone, casual sweater) gently turns a sturdy deadbolt on a modern front door. Focus on the brushed‑metal lock and keys on a wall hook; fitted kitchen units glow softly in the background, calm and tidy. Natural afternoon light, budget‑conscious, secure vibe. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth of field; lock and hand crisp, soft bokeh behind. Natural perspective, candid gaze away from camera. Correct anatomy, natural hands, realistic skin, true‑to‑life textures, clean composition, uncluttered hallway. Subtle before/after feeling: bright, orderly interior vs slightly shadowed porch beyond the door. No text, no logos, no trademarks, no watermark, no excessive retouching, no over‑saturation.</Prompt1>
<Prompt2>An extreme close‑up of intact roof tiles after a passing rain shower; beads of water glisten and run cleanly along the tile edges. In soft focus behind, a straight, well‑kept garden fence leads toward a secure side gate, conveying resilience and order. Golden hour breaks through clouds to suggest calm after the storm. 50mm prime, f/2.8, shallow depth; nearest tile edge razor‑sharp, background bokeh. Natural outdoor light, true‑to‑life texture: slate, wood grain, matte paint. Clean composition, no people, no devices. No text, no logos, no watermark, no unrealistic reflections, no plastic sheen, no over‑sharpening.</Prompt2>
<Prompt3>Top‑down flat lay on a tidy kitchen island: house keys on a ring, a simple calculator, two identical plain envelopes, a pen, and three neatly aligned blank comparison cards. Correct proportions, clean composition, uncluttered background. No hands, no devices. No text, no logos, no brands, no watermark, no UI, no harsh shadows, natural color balance.</Prompt3>

Subtle reflections match the space. Natural daylight, practical, reassuring mood. Correct anatomy, natural hands and grip, realistic skin, no floating devices. Clean composition, uncluttered. No text, no logos, no brands, no watermark, no dramatic color grading.</Prompt5>

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:

- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints

- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

I'm new to health insurance I'm a current HBF member I'm thinking of switching to HBF I'm visiting from overseas Learn more about health insurance Find trusted advice and support to help you choose the right cover for you. How to choose the right extras cover Read more 3 things to ask yourself before you buy hospital cover Private health insurance FAQs and how it works Visit our blog for more Why trust HBF for your health insurance? We're not-for-profit We’re one of the largest not-for-profit health funds in Australia and with no shareholders to pay, we focus on giving more back to our members. We’ve been in the business of health since 1941 We’ve got over 80 years’ experience supporting our members’ health and wellbeing. Mix and match Mix and match our hospital and extras products to create cover that’s right for you. A health insurer that puts members first? We’ve got proof, not just promises Benefits of HBF membership HBF health members get access to great discounts and health programs. HBF Member Perks HBF members get access to a range of offers as part of our Member Perks program. You’ll find discounts on gym memberships, shopping, entertainment and more*. Browse offers Health programs Eligible HBF members* can get help staying healthy or managing a health condition. Learn more Pharmacy services Eligible HBF members can use their extras cover for flu vaccinations, health checks and more. Frequently asked questions What is health insurance? Also known as health cover, health insurance is an umbrella term for the types of insurances available to help cover your healthcare costs in Australia: hospital insurance and extras insurance. Hospital insurance Also known as hospital cover, hospital insurance helps cover some of the costs when you're admitted to hospital. It can help cover some of the costs for things like doctors' fees, accommodation and theatre fees. Extras insurance Also known as ancillary cover or extras cover, extras insurance helps cover some or all of the costs for everyday healthcare services including things like dental check-ups, physio appointments and glasses or contacts. These services are generally not covered by Medicare. With HBF, you can choose to purchase hospital or extras insurance on their own, or you can buy both to create a combined policy. Learn more: What is extras insurance? What is hospital insurance? Also known as hospital cover, hospital insurance helps cover costs when you're admitted to hospital. It covers things like your doctors' fees, accommodation and theatre fees. Learn more about hospital cover Also known as ancillary cover or extras cover, extras insurance helps cover the cost of everyday healthcare services including things like dental check-ups, physio appointments and glasses or contacts. These services are generally not covered by Medicare. Learn more about extras cover Who does health insurance cover? You can get health cover for yourself, you and your partner, or for your whole family. Generally, there are four categories of membership: 1 adult (single) 2 adults (couple) 2 adults and any number of dependant*children (family) 1 adult and any number of dependant*children (single parent) How long can my kids stay on my policy? Your kids can stay on your policy if they meet the criteria of a dependant. A dependant is a child who is under the age of 21 and is: covered by a family or single parent policy; and is not married or living in a de-facto relationship. At HBF we also choose to cover dependants under 25 years of age provided they meet the criteria in the 2 points noted above and they: are a full-time student; or earn no more than $24,500 taxable income per calendar year. Can I purchase maternity cover with no waiting period? No. HBF, like most health funds, have a 12-month waiting period for pregnancy and birth. Waiting periods help to discourage people from signing up for health cover, claiming and leaving soon after, which drives premiums up for all other members of the health fund. What is a not-for-profit health fund? HBF is a not-for-profit health fund. A not-for-profit uses any money it makes to further its business objectives and cover the cost of running the business, like paying utilities bills and staff. Any surplus earnings (profits) are also used to help further the not-for-profit's mission. For-profit businesses have the same overheads as not-for-profits, however they use some or all profits to pay shareholders or investors. What is 'community rating'? In Australia, insurance is either 'community rated' or 'risk rated'. Health insurance is 'community rated'. Community rating is part of private health insurance legislation and dictates that everyone living in the same state is entitled to get private health insurance and pay the same base price for the same health insurance policies. This means health funds cannot set a person's health insurance premium using individual factors like age, gender, lifestyle or physical condition. Still have questions? However you want to connect with us, we’re here for you. Call 133 423 Request a callback Email us HBF acknowledges the Traditional Owners of the lands where we live and work. We want to play our part in ensuring that our shared presence brings genuine benefit to First Nations people. View our Reconciliation Action Plan to learn more. About Provider Support Legal Contact Download the HBF App © 2026 Copyright HBF Health Limited - (ABN) 11 126 884 786 and its subsidiaries. Accessibility Sitemap HBF Private health members can mix and match our hospital and extras products as well as get access to discounts and health programs.

You are an expert Ad Creative Director and Senior AI Image Prompt Engineer, specialized in high-performing Native Advertisement visuals.

Given a landing page URL and its extracted content fields, your task is to generate five (5) high-quality English image generation prompts for Native Ads.

First, reason about the product inside <think>...</think> tags. Extract the following from the landing page:
- ProductType: Physical Product / Digital Product / Service
- SpecificProduct: concise noun phrase
- Category: broad product/service category
- VisualAnchors: 2-3 specific physical elements implied by the page
- LifestyleVibe: emotional tone of the experience
- CoreValueSignals: up to 3 from [professional, premium, affordable, efficient, reliable, simple]

Then output exactly 5 prompts. Each prompt must:
- Be <=150 words
- Embed all safety, realism, quality, and exclusion constraints
- Feel native and non-promotional
- Show the product outcome or value naturally in context
- Avoid stereotypes, text/logos in image, and stock-photo aesthetics
- Ensure correct anatomy, natural hands, sharp focus, clean composition

Output format:
<think>
ProductType: ...
SpecificProduct: ...
Category: ...
VisualAnchors: ...
LifestyleVibe: ...
CoreValueSignals: ...
</think>

<Prompt5>...</Prompt5>

Generate 5 image generation prompts for a Native Ad based on the following landing page information:


[Landing Page URL]
https://silkpathhotel.com/hue/

[Document Title]
Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel | Ideally located 5* hotel in Hue | Family-friendly hotel in Vietnam

[Visual Title]
TIMELESS LUXURY IN IMPERIAL CITY

[Heading]
SEE EAT PLAY #SILKPATHJOURNEY Beautiful moments of our beloved guests at Silk Path Grand Hue

[Title (CB)]
silk path grand hue hotel ideally located 5 hotel in hue family friendly hotel in vietnam

[Best Snippet (CB)]
TIMELESS LUXURY IN IMPERIAL CITY. Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa lies in the midst of the former royal capital, on the bank of An Cuu River. Inspired by the rich history of the r

[Meta Description]
Centrally located in Hue, Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel blends European elegance with Imperial opulence, offering exceptional base to explore the city's treasures

[Page Content]
Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa lies in the midst of the former royal capital, on the bank of An Cuu River. Inspired by the rich history of the royal city dotted with palaces and courts of the Nguyen Dynasty, the hotel blends European-style architecture with intricate Imperial-style décor for an immersive and distinctive guest experience. THE ANCIENT IMPERIAL CAPITAL Hue, a city steeped in history, culture, and imperial grandeur, is a mesmerizing gem in the heart of Vietnam. This captivating destination, located on the banks of the Perfume River, boasts an illustrious past as the former imperial capital of the Nguyen Dynasty. Its historic charm is elegantly showcased through its ancient citadel, ornate temples, and regal tombs, providing a window into the rich tapestry of Vietnamese heritage. Hue’s tranquil atmosphere, exquisite cuisine, and warm-hearted locals invite travelers to immerse themselves in a truly enchanting experience. ACCOMMODATION SLEEP EASY IN VIETNAM’S MOST RELAXED CITY Our rooms are a fusion of imperial splendor, colonial charm, and modern sophistication. Spend the day unearthing ancient tombs, marveling at glistening temples, and learning about Hue’s compelling history. Then return to the comfort of your room and absorb the gentle city views. SEE MORE EXCLUSIVE OFFERS AND BEST HOTEL DEALS The Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa grants a range of special offers and exclusive promotions when you book directly with us. GET OFFERS DINING FOOD BEFITTING A CULINARY GIANT Silk Path Grand Hue is renowned for its vibrant culinary scene, among a plethora of restaurants in Hue, offering a wide array of delights. From the iconic beef noodle soup to the exquisite rice cakes once savored by royalty, our menu pays homage to this rich gastronomic heritage. While we celebrate local specialties that can tantalize your taste buds for days, we also offer a diverse selection of Vietnamese classics, along with international favorites such as Spanish tapas, Italian pizza, and pasta. RECREATION A COLLECTION OF EXTRAORDINARY EXPERIENCES Indulge in a realm of relaxation and rejuvenation at Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa, where a plethora of facilities await to enhance your serenity. Sweep the hectic away with a refreshing workout at our gym, followed by a blissful dip in the garden swimming pool or treat yourself to the ultimate pampering experience at our Chi spa. AN HIEN GARDEN HOUSE Imprinted the Vietnamese traditional architecture style, colored by untold historical stories, with a touch of Fengshui traits, An Hien Garden House is a graceful intersection of astounding culture and poetic landscape for visitors to indulge in. Although the 130-year- old garden house has changed hands several times, the ownership of An Hien surprisingly would always be the royalty, aristocracies and nobilities in the Imperial City. In modern days, two unique principles of An Hien are well-kept, the fascinating four-season garden and its originality in a Hue garden house. Discover exclusive offers and promotions, tailored to elevate your stay in Hue, Vietnam’s imperial treasure trove. PLAN YOUR EVENTS WEDDINGS ARE OUR SPECIALTY – BUT IT DOESN’T STOP THERE As Hue is undoubtedly one of Vietnam’s most romantic cities, the Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa is an effortlessly elegant place for weddings, but we can also organize royal banquets, productive conferences and more. THINGS TO DO IN HUE LOCAL EXPLORATION Delve into the enchanting world of Hue, Vietnam’s imperial gem, through our extensive travel guide. Explore the rich history, vibrant culture, and myriad activities that await you in this historic city, as we guide you through the best things to do in Hue. Centrally located in Hue, Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel blends European elegance with Imperial opulence, offering exceptional base to explore the city's treasures

</think>

The service outcome feels present: perfectly kept pool, plush towels, attentive vibe; the “after” calm implied by orderly loungers and warm light replacing earlier bustle. 50mm prime lens, f/2.8 shallow depth of field, natural perspective, soft bokeh. Timeless luxury palette: ivory stone, jade tiles, gold accents. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, sharp focus on water edge, clean composition, uncluttered background. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, no excessive retouching, realistic skin textures, minimal makeup.</Prompt1>

A relaxed hand (30s, neutral-tone robe) reaches for the teacup, candid, not looking at camera. The “after” calm implied by crisp linens, neatly turned bed, and warm sunlight replacing night’s cool tones. 35mm prime lens, f/2.8, shallow depth; sharp focus on tray, river and drapery elegantly blurred. Timeless luxury palette: cream, teak, brass. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, sharp focus, clean composition, uncluttered background. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, realistic textures, natural reflections on porcelain and glass.</Prompt2>

The “after” transformation implied by impeccable symmetry, polished floors, and perfectly dressed tables. 50mm prime lens, f/2.8, shallow depth, cinematic bokeh, warm ivory and gold palette. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, sharp focus on arrangement, clean composition, uncluttered background. No extra text, no logos, no watermark, no UI elements, realistic lighting, no over-saturation, premium finish.</Prompt3>
<Prompt4>Professional conference ready-room in Hue, Vietnam: European-Imperial salon with river glints through tall windows. Staff member (30s, neat uniform) subtly straightens a chair, candid, not looking at camera. Attendees (diverse adults) enter in soft background blur. 35mm prime lens, f/2.8, shallow depth; sharp focus on table edge, restrained palette of cream, mahogany, brass. <Prompt5>Extreme close-up spa scene: herbal compress massage in an Imperial-inspired treatment room. Hue, Vietnam setting, timeless luxury, muted greens and golds. Candid, subject not facing camera. Correct anatomy, natural hands and limbs, sharp focus on compress and skin, clean composition, uncluttered background. ACCOMMODATION SLEEP EASY IN VIETNAM’S MOST RELAXED CITY Our rooms are a fusion of imperial splendor, colonial charm, and modern sophistication. Spend the day unearthing ancient tombs, marveling at glistening temples, and learning about Hue’s compelling history. Then return to the comfort of your room and absorb the gentle city views. SEE MORE EXCLUSIVE OFFERS AND BEST HOTEL DEALS The Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa grants a range of special offers and exclusive promotions when you book directly with us. GET OFFERS DINING FOOD BEFITTING A CULINARY GIANT Silk Path Grand Hue is renowned for its vibrant culinary scene, among a plethora of restaurants in Hue, offering a wide array of delights. From the iconic beef noodle soup to the exquisite rice cakes once savored by royalty, our menu pays homage to this rich gastronomic heritage. While we celebrate local specialties that can tantalize your taste buds for days, we also offer a diverse selection of Vietnamese classics, along with international favorites such as Spanish tapas, Italian pizza, and pasta. RECREATION A COLLECTION OF EXTRAORDINARY EXPERIENCES Indulge in a realm of relaxation and rejuvenation at Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa, where a plethora of facilities await to enhance your serenity. Sweep the hectic away with a refreshing workout at our gym, followed by a blissful dip in the garden swimming pool or treat yourself to the ultimate pampering experience at our Chi spa. AN HIEN GARDEN HOUSE Imprinted the Vietnamese traditional architecture style, colored by untold historical stories, with a touch of Fengshui traits, An Hien Garden House is a graceful intersection of astounding culture and poetic landscape for visitors to indulge in. Although the 130-year- old garden house has changed hands several times, the ownership of An Hien surprisingly would always be the royalty, aristocracies and nobilities in the Imperial City. In modern days, two unique principles of An Hien are well-kept, the fascinating four-season garden and its originality in a Hue garden house. Discover exclusive offers and promotions, tailored to elevate your stay in Hue, Vietnam’s imperial treasure trove. PLAN YOUR EVENTS WEDDINGS ARE OUR SPECIALTY – BUT IT DOESN’T STOP THERE As Hue is undoubtedly one of Vietnam’s most romantic cities, the Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa is an effortlessly elegant place for weddings, but we can also organize royal banquets, productive conferences and more. mc250001 prestige domestic cleaning

Click Here - To Get Your Immediate Online Quote At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we offer more than just a cleaning service. We deliver a bespoke experience tailored to the specific needs of your home. From meticulous attention to detail to eco-friendly cleaning products, our service is designed for those who want nothing but the best for their home. We specialise in ensuring your home, along with your cherished posessions, furniture and finishes, are treated with the care they deserve. We focus on delivering impeccable results, with every corner of your home cleaned to perfection. No detail is too small and nothing is overlooked. Our highly trained and vetted team operates with discretion and professionalism, ensuring both your privacy and home are always secure. Get An Immediate Online Quote Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. “I believe that your home is more than just a house – it’s a reflection of your lifestyle, your achievements and the environment you cherish most. That’s why I started this company: to offer a service that goes beyond the ordinary and focuses on delivering the exceptional care and attention that your home truly deserves.” At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we believe that a luxury service should come with a luxury experience. That’s why we’ve streamlined our process to ensure every step is simple, seamless and tailored to your needs. From the initial consultation to delivering immaculate results, we take care of everythin so you can enjoy your beautifully maintained home without having to lift a finger. Simply click the button that will take you to an onine form for you to fill in. The form will ask you for some basic information about you, your home and the cleaning services you want. Click submit and you’ll receive an email with your quote. You’ll receive a link to book your free, no obligation ‘Home Cleaning Assessment’ at a time that suits. During this consultation, we’ll assess your home, discuss your specific cleaning requirements, and tailor a personalised cleaning plan just for you. After the consultation, we create a detailed cleaning plan that’s specifically designed for you. Whatever type of cleaning service you need, we’ll work together to create a cleaning plan that fits your needs on a schedule that’s right for you and your home. Our experienced and highly trained team arrives at your home to carry out the agreed clean. We work with the utmost professionalism, ensuring minimal disruption to your routine. When we’re finished, your home will be immaculately clean. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, click the button below to contact us. Contact Us Our commitment to perfection doesn’t end when we leave. If you’ve scheduled regular cleanings, we’ll continue to maintain your home’s beauty and elegance on a schedule that works for you. We also welcome your feedback and will adjust our services to meet your evolving needs. Click Here - Book Your Free Cleaning Assessment Trusted by Luxury Home Owners all over Wiltshire “Their attention to detail is second to none and I trust them implicitly with my most prized possessions. It’s rare to find a company that understands the needs of luxury homeowners like they do. Thank you” Emma “The team at Prestige Domestic Cleaning are true professionals. From the first consultation to the ongoing service, I’ve been impressed with their discretion, reliability, and flawless results.” James “We use Prestige Domestic Cleaning to keep our holiday home in the Cotswolds clean and tidy. Their service is impeccable, they’re discreet, professional and always leave our home in perfect condition.” Charlotte & William There are big differences between the serivice you recieve from a cleaning company, a franchise cleaning business or self-employed cleaners. At Prestige Domestic Cleaning, we only employ cleaners on a permenant basis. This means that we don’t use contract cleaners (on zero hours contracts) or self employed cleaners who work for themselves. Below are some of the benefits you will get by using us to clean your home over cleaning franchises (such as Molly Maid or Maid2Clean) and stand alone self employed cleaners. All our expert cleaners are permenant and fully employed by the company. This means that you will get a consistent service and full accountability for that service by our cleaners. We don’t use contract cleaners, like most franchise cleaning companies (MollyMaid/Maid2Clean etc.). This means that we can provide fully trained and experienced cover so you never miss a clean. All our expert cleaners go through our bespoke and comprehensive training programme. They’re also required to pass regular training updates and assessments. This means you’ll get the best cleaners in the industry. Because we don’t use contract cleaners, rather, we employ them. This means that we can train our expert cleaners to the highest standards of technique, care, conduct and behaviour. You will receive a consistently high service, no matter who visits your home. Our expert cleaners are specifically trainined to clean high end fixtures, fittings and furniture. This means that your antiques, furniture, premium surfaces (such as marble or teak surfaces) and fine art, are cared for to the highest standard. We understand that we are in a very privilaged position when we enter your home to clean. We make sure that all our cleaners are fully DBS checked and vetted before they’re employed. We can also sign any NDS or other non-disclosure documents. Would you like one of our cleaning experts to visit you and discuss your home’s unique cleaning requirements and provide you with a quote? If the answer is ‘YES’ then click the button below and pick a time and date that’s convenient to you. Click Here Your 30 minute Home Cleaning Assessment Visit helps us to understand your unique cleaning needs and provide a tailored cleaning plan, just for you and your home. After you’ve received your online quote and you’re happy to proceed, you will be invited to book a cleaning assessment visit at a date and time that’s convenient to you. During this visit, one of our luxury cleaning experts will accompany you on a ‘walk through’ of your home to: Assess each room’s specific cleaning requirements. Identify any surfaces, furniture, fixtures or fittings that require specialist cleaning. Discuss your unique preferences, such as depth of cleaning required, frequency, discretion and security. This personalised approach ensures that we deliver the highest level of care and attention to every detail, leaving your home impeccably clean and your expectations exceeded. Click the button above to get your no obligation quote, sent directly to your inbox. Or, fill out the form below to contact us.

RightSure for Business Landlord Insurance Instant quotes, easy online purchase, and an unbeatable price match promise* Price Match Promise* Safe & Secure UK Based Specialists Quote & Buy Online 24/7 High Level of Standard Cover At RightSure For Business, we understand that managing rental properties comes with its own challenges. From finding reliable tenants to protecting your investment during void periods, there’s a lot to consider, and having the right insurance in place is essential. Our specialist Landlord Insurance protects your property and income against risks like fire, flood, theft, accidental damage, and loss of rent. Whether you own a single property or multiple rentals, we’ll help you find cover for your property and budget. If you find a cheaper quote for an equivalent policy within two days of purchase and can provide written proof, you may cancel with us and receive a full refund, provided no claims have been made. That’s our promise: competitive cover, guaranteed peace of mind. Landlord insurance offers financial protection to property owners renting to tenants. There are three main types of insurance available: Buildings Insurance – this covers your bricks and mortar. It covers damage to the structure of your property as well as the rebuild cost if it is damaged beyond repair. Landlord Contents Insurance – The cost of repairing or replacing the furniture, fixtures, and fittings you provide in your rental property is covered by landlord’s contents insurance. The level of cover will depend on if you’re letting your property as furnished Liability Insurance – provides protection to landlords if you, your tenant or guests become injured in your property. There are a number of other add-ons which maybe useful to have. Want to discuss further? Call our award winning Landlord Insurance Specialists on 0800 515 381.
